Home
WEB3 & BITCOIN

Bitcoin Lightning Bounty Marketplace Paying Investigators in Sats for Catching Corporate Greenwashing

VERIDION-X is a gig economy for fraud detection — investigators earn Bitcoin for catching corporate ESG greenwashing. Oracle nodes reach cryptographic consensus via FROST signatures; verdicts are sealed on Bitcoin and published to Nostr. Submitted to MIT Bitcoin Hackathon.

Date

April 2026

Duration

48 hours

Team

Solo

Category

WEB3 & BITCOIN

Bitcoin LightningReact 19Node.jsFROSTGroq
01 / 03

The Problem

Most corporate ESG claims are never independently verified. Investors cannot distinguish genuine sustainability from marketing fiction. There is no economic incentive to find fraud and no global payment layer to compensate investigators without banks or KYC.

The Solution

Investigators claim bounties on posted companies. Three independent oracle nodes query live government data (EIA, EPA, SEC, NASA) and reach 2-of-3 FROST threshold consensus. Fraud detection triggers a real BOLT11 Lightning invoice — payment settles in under one second, globally, with no intermediary.

Key Features

01

FROST 2-of-3 Oracle Consensus

Three independent oracle nodes use Flexible Round-Optimised Schnorr Threshold signatures — no single node controls the verdict.

02

Live Government Data Audits

Real-time queries against EIA renewable data, EPA emissions records, SEC EDGAR filings, and NASA POWER satellite imagery.

03

Sub-Second Bitcoin Lightning Payments

LNbits generates real BOLT11 invoices; investigators scan with any Lightning wallet and receive payment in under one second.

04

Permanent Nostr Publication

Verdicts are sealed via Bitcoin Taproot OP_RETURN on testnet and published to Nostr — permanently uncensorable and independently verifiable.

Tech Stack

Blockchain

Bitcoin LightningLNbitsBOLT11TaprootNostr

Cryptography

FROSTSchnorr SignaturesShamir Secret Sharing

Frontend

React 19Framer MotionRechartsZustand

Backend

Node.js ESMExpressGroq 70B
